flows.name: v1_start
flows.description: v1 OPDS root (Atom navigation feed at /opds/v1.2/).

flows.name: v1_root_browse
flows.description: v1 root browse (Atom feed at the canonical group URL).

flows.name: v1_series_acquisition
flows.description: v1 acquisition feed for the busiest series — exercises the per-entry stream / download / cover link generation in v1/entry/links.py. ``topGroup=s`` is required because the between-flow settings reset defaults topGroup to ``p`` (Publisher) and ``s/325/1`` would 302 to root otherwise.

flows.name: v1_acquisition_with_metadata
flows.description: v1 acquisition feed with ?opdsMetadata=1 — fires the 9-query M2M fan-out (authors / contributors / category_groups) per entry. Headline number for sub-plan 03 #1.

flows.name: v2_start
flows.description: v2 OPDS start page at /opds/v2.0 — fires the preview-pipeline rerun for every PREVIEW_GROUPS link spec (sub-plan 02 #2).

flows.name: v2_root_browse
flows.description: v2 JSON feed at the root group URL.

flows.name: v2_series_publications
flows.description: v2 publications feed for the busiest series — per-publication _thumb / link assembly hot path. ``topGroup=s`` for the same reason as v1_series_acquisition.

flows.name: v2_manifest
flows.description: v2 single-comic manifest. Headline number for sub-plan 05: 11-query credit fan-out + 7-query M2M subject loop + story_arcs N+1 + per-page reading_order reverse() calls.

flows.name: v2_progression_get
flows.description: Progression GET for the busiest comic. Returns 204 when the test user has no bookmark — still exercises the ACL filter + FilteredRelation annotation pipeline (sub-plan 06 #2).
